category_sources: Official documentation title describes openFPGALoader as a universal utility for programming FPGA.
source_facts.description: Universal utility for programming FPGA
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub repository use openFPGALoader capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation is titled openFPGALoader: universal utility for programming FPGA.
Official GitHub repository links to trabucayre.github.io/openFPGALoader/ as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/trabucayre/openFPGALoader, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository and docs describe vendor-specific FPGA programming documentation and first steps.
